[Nolbu Mandu] [Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu]
You can see its age It's just a local dumpling shop
Let's head in

[No way I'm in front of Tzuyang]
My dad watches you too
[1st generation owner, the mandu professional]
He makes them all himself
[Quick and precise hand work]

I've picked the right day

5 orders of memil noodles
